title: stelis loejtnantii
intro: Stelis loejtnantii, also known as the Yellow Monkey Face Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis loejtnantii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Stelis loejtnantii include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
